## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to an existing limitation?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or mockups.
